title: lomaria krebsii
intro: Lomaria krebsii, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lomariaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lomaria krebsii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
